01.scope: This division encompasses the cultivation of plants and raising of animals for food, fiber, and other agricultural outputs, alongside related hunting and wildlife management operations.

02.scope: Forestry and logging encompasses the harvesting, processing, and transportation of timber and other forest products.

03.scope: Fishing and aquaculture encompasses the capture of marine and freshwater organisms, as well as the cultivation and rearing of aquatic species for commercial or recreational purposes.

05.scope: This division encompasses the extraction of coal and lignite from the earth through underground and surface mining operations.

06.scope: This division encompasses the operational processes involved in retrieving raw crude oil and natural gas from subterranean reservoirs.

07.scope: This division encompasses the extraction of metallic ores from the earth through various underground and surface mining techniques.

08.scope: This division encompasses the extraction of non-metallic minerals, stone, and aggregates from the earth through various methods, excluding coal, oil, and metal ores.

09.scope: This division encompasses the provision of specialized support functions and equipment related to the operation of mines and quarries, ensuring efficient and safe extraction processes.

10.scope: Division 10 encompasses the production of edible and potable goods, ranging from raw agricultural inputs to finished consumer items.

11.scope: This division encompasses the production of alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks, including bottling, brewing, and carbonation processes.

12.scope: Manufacture of products containing tobacco, including cigarettes, cigars, pipes, and related accessories.

13.scope: Manufacture of textile fibers, fabrics, yarns, and related textile goods from raw materials or processed materials.

14.scope: Manufacture of finished clothing items, including garments, suits, and outerwear, encompassing design, cutting, sewing, and finishing processes.

15.scope: This division encompasses the production of goods primarily constructed from animal hides, skins, and related materials, including bags, belts, footwear, upholstery, and accessories.

16.scope: This division encompasses the processing and fabrication of wood, cork, straw, and plaiting materials into a diverse range of tangible goods.

17.scope: This division encompasses the production of paper sheets, cardboard, paperboard, and related products from pulp and cellulose fibers.

18.scope: Printing and reproduction of recorded media encompasses the production of printed materials, including books, magazines, labels, and specialized media like CDs, DVDs, and digital printing services.

19.scope: This division encompasses the production of coke and various petroleum-based substances, including fuels, lubricants, and chemical intermediates derived from crude oil processing.

20.scope: This division encompasses the production of substances and compounds through chemical reactions and processes, resulting in a diverse range of materials and formulations.

21.scope: This division encompasses the production of medicinal substances and compounded medications, from raw ingredients to finished dosage forms.

22.scope: This division encompasses the production of goods primarily composed of rubber and plastic materials, ranging from molded components to finished consumer and industrial items.

23.scope: This division encompasses the production of a diverse range of goods derived from non-metallic minerals such as stone, clay, gypsum, and slate, including building materials, tiles, and refractories.

24.scope: Division 24 encompasses the production of metals – including iron, steel, aluminum, copper, and zinc – through processes such as smelting, casting, forging, and rolling, resulting in a wide range of metallic components and finished products.

25.scope: This division encompasses the shaping, forming, and treating of metal into a wide range of components, structures, and finished goods.

26.scope: This division encompasses the production of devices and components utilizing semiconductors, integrated circuits, and displays, ranging from personal computing equipment to specialized optical instruments.

27.scope: Manufacture of electrical equipment, including generators, motors, transformers, wiring, and related components.

28.scope: This division encompasses the production of a wide range of mechanical and electromechanical devices, encompassing both stationary and mobile equipment designed for various industrial and commercial applications.

29.scope: This division encompasses the production of complete motor vehicles, trailers, and semi-trailers, including their assembly and component fabrication.

30.scope: This division encompasses the production of vehicles, trailers, and related equipment not specifically covered by divisions dedicated to motor vehicles or furniture.

31.scope: Manufacture of furniture, encompassing the design, construction, and assembly of seating, tables, storage units, and other household and office furnishings.

32.scope: Division 32 encompasses a diverse range of manufacturing processes and the production of goods that do not fall into more specific categories within Section C.

33.scope: This division encompasses the restoration, upkeep, and initial setup of mechanical and electrical devices, encompassing a wide range of equipment and systems.

35.scope: This division encompasses the provision of electrical power, gaseous fuels, thermal energy, and climate control systems to various consumers and industrial facilities.

36.scope: This division encompasses the collection, purification, distribution, and sale of potable water, as well as the operation of water infrastructure and treatment facilities.

37.scope: Division 37 encompasses the collection, transport, and treatment of wastewater and sewage, ensuring its safe discharge or reuse.

38.scope: This division encompasses the collection, processing, and final disposal of various waste streams, including municipal, commercial, and industrial refuse.

39.scope: This division encompasses specialized operations focused on restoring contaminated sites and providing comprehensive waste treatment beyond basic collection and disposal.

41.scope: This division encompasses the construction of all types of buildings, from single-family homes to large commercial structures, involving site preparation, structural work, and finishing.

42.scope: Civil engineering encompasses the design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure projects such as roads, bridges, dams, and earthworks.

43.scope: Specialised construction activities encompass the construction of structures and facilities requiring specialized techniques, materials, and equipment beyond standard building or civil engineering projects.

45.scope: This division encompasses the buying and selling of new and used motor vehicles, motorcycles, and related parts, alongside their maintenance and repair operations.

46.scope: Wholesale trade involves the buying and selling of goods between businesses, primarily acting as an intermediary between manufacturers and retailers.

47.scope: Retail trade encompasses the sale of goods directly to end-users, typically in establishments such as stores and markets.

49.scope: This division encompasses the movement of goods and materials over land and through pipelines, involving vehicles, tankers, and related infrastructure.

50.scope: Water transport division encompasses the operation of vessels and related activities for the carriage of goods and passengers over navigable waterways.

51.scope: Air transport encompasses the operation of aircraft, including passenger and cargo transportation, maintenance, and related support functions.

52.scope: This division encompasses the logistical operations of storing goods, managing inventory, and providing auxiliary services to facilitate the movement of freight.

53.scope: Postal and courier activities encompass the collection, processing, and delivery of mail and packages using various transportation methods.

55.scope: Accommodation encompasses establishments providing lodging, meeting facilities, and related services for travelers and guests.

56.scope: Food and beverage service activities encompass establishments providing prepared food and beverages to consumers, typically in a dining or takeaway setting.

58.scope: Publishing activities encompass the production, printing, and distribution of written materials, including books, journals, magazines, and newspapers.

59.scope: This division encompasses the creation and production of audiovisual content, including films, television programs, music recordings, and related distribution.

60.scope: This division encompasses the creation, transmission, and distribution of audio and visual content, including television, radio, online streaming, and news dissemination.

61.scope: Division 61 encompasses the provision of broadcasting, telecommunications, and internet-related services, including network infrastructure, signal transmission, and content distribution.

62.scope: This division encompasses the design, development, and implementation of software, IT consulting, data analysis, and related digital support functions.

63.scope: This division encompasses the provision of infrastructure and services related to data storage, processing, and online access, facilitating digital information exchange and application delivery.

64.scope: This division encompasses businesses involved in providing financial transactions, brokerage, and related advisory services excluding insurance and pension schemes.

65.scope: This division encompasses organizations involved in providing financial protection against risk through insurance contracts, managing pension funds, and engaging in reinsurance operations.

66.scope: This division encompasses support functions and specialized operations directly facilitating financial and insurance processes, including data processing, valuation, and regulatory compliance.

68.scope: Real estate activities division 68 encompasses the business of buying, selling, renting, developing, and managing properties, including land and buildings.

69.scope: Legal and accounting activities encompass the provision of financial expertise, legal counsel, and related support to individuals and organizations.

70.scope: This division encompasses strategic planning, organizational oversight, and advisory support provided to businesses and public sector entities, focusing on improving operational efficiency and achieving specific goals.

71.scope: This division encompasses the design, planning, and execution of construction projects and the provision of specialized technical expertise through engineering and analysis.

72.scope: Scientific research and development encompasses the systematic investigation and experimentation undertaken to advance knowledge, create new technologies, and improve existing processes.

73.scope: This division encompasses the creation and dissemination of promotional content, the analysis of consumer behavior, and the cultivation of brand image through communication strategies.

74.scope: Division 74 encompasses a broad range of specialized occupations and expertise involving analysis, interpretation, and application of knowledge across diverse fields.

75.scope: Veterinary activities encompass the examination, treatment, and prevention of animal diseases and injuries, alongside related animal care and husbandry.

77.scope: This division encompasses the provision of temporary use of tangible assets, including machinery, equipment, vehicles, and real estate, through contractual agreements.

78.scope: Division 78 encompasses organizations primarily engaged in providing human resources support, including recruitment, training, payroll, and personnel management.

79.scope: This division encompasses businesses that arrange and facilitate travel, tourism, and related booking arrangements for clients.

80.scope: Division 80 encompasses professional work related to the detection, prevention, and response to threats, including criminal investigations, risk assessments, and security surveillance.

81.scope: This division encompasses the provision of specialized expertise and labor related to the construction, maintenance, and enhancement of buildings and outdoor spaces.

82.scope: This division encompasses organizations providing clerical, secretarial, and other administrative support functions, as well as data entry, document preparation, and general office operations.

84.scope: This division encompasses governmental functions related to national security, social welfare programs, legal enforcement, and the administration of public services.

85.scope: Division 85 encompasses establishments primarily engaged in providing instruction and training, encompassing formal schooling, vocational training, and higher education.

86.scope: Human health activities encompass the provision of medical, dental, optical, and pharmaceutical care, as well as diagnostic testing and rehabilitation services.

87.scope: Residential care activities encompass establishments providing long-term care and support for individuals with disabilities, chronic illnesses, or requiring assistance with daily living.

88.scope: This division encompasses professional assistance provided to individuals and communities regarding welfare, support, and advocacy, excluding direct care or housing provision.

90.scope: This division encompasses the creation and presentation of artistic works, encompassing live performances, visual arts production, and creative design.

91.scope: This division encompasses institutions dedicated to collecting, preserving, researching, exhibiting, and disseminating cultural heritage materials and knowledge.

92.scope: Gambling and betting activities encompass establishments and operations centered around wagering, betting, and related games of chance.

93.scope: This division encompasses establishments and organizations primarily engaged in providing recreational experiences, sporting events, and amusement offerings to the public.

94.scope: This division encompasses organizations that facilitate connections, provide resources, and represent the interests of individuals or entities within a specific field.

95.scope: This division encompasses the restoration, upkeep, and adjustment of electronic devices, domestic appliances, vehicles, and their components to restore functionality and extend their lifespan.

96.scope: Personal service activities encompass a wide range of occupations and services provided directly to individuals or other businesses, focusing on human skills and specialized expertise.

97.scope: This division encompasses the employment of domestic staff by private households for tasks such as cleaning, childcare, gardening, and personal assistance.

98.scope: This division encompasses the production of goods and provision of services within private households, primarily for the household’s own consumption and use, rather than for sale or external distribution.

99.scope: This division encompasses the operations, functions, and missions of international organizations, agencies, and bodies operating independently of national governments, including peacekeeping, humanitarian aid, scientific research, and diplomatic initiatives.
